/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/test_okx_api.dir/examples/test_okx_api.cpp.o -o test_okx_api  libokx_rest_api.a /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libcurl.tbd /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libcurl.tbd /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.5.0/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.5.0/lib/libcrypto.dylib
